overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character V navigating a neon-lit Night City street at night. The character approaches the camera, turns, and proceeds down an urban corridor lined with construction barriers and illuminated by red overhead lights, with futuristic skyscrapers rising in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with red neon lighting

events.description: character turns around and begins walking away from camera down the street

agents.ego_description: running toward the camera under the elevated highway, then turning and proceeding away down the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with red neon strip lighting underneath
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
smooth concrete barrier wall running alongside the walkway
plastic construction barriers with reflective stripes lining the street edge
illuminated commercial sign with cyan and white lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway structure bathed in red neon light. The player character V runs toward the camera along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a retaining wall and construction barriers, then turns and begins walking away. The scene is enclosed and sheltered, with a towering glass skyscraper visible in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with construction barriers

events.description: exits the covered underpass area into a more open urban street with visible storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the city street away from the camera, navigating between construction barriers

entered.detail: multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage
tall lamp posts with warm orange glow

segments.scene_description: The camera follows V from behind as they proceed down an open city street lined with futuristic commercial buildings and glowing neon signs. Having left the covered underpass behind, the scene reveals more of the urban canyon environment with wet pavement reflecting the streetlights. Construction barriers continue to line the path as the character approaches a distant intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, red-lit underpass into the expansive neon glow of an open city street. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway where the player character V runs toward the camera along a concrete sidewalk bordered by construction barriers, before turning to walk away. As the character moves forward, the enclosed space of the underpass gives way to a wide urban canyon, shifting the lighting from a concentrated red hue to a multicolored array of glowing neon signs. The scene then expands to reveal wet pavement reflecting the city lights and towering commercial buildings that line the path. Finally, the camera follows V deeper into the environment, passing further construction barriers as they approach a distant intersection under the night sky.
